title: Projects — Jude Hill
description: Explore side projects, experiments, and tools by Jude Hill, from in-progress ideas to shipped web products.

blocks.text: A collection of apps, tools, and experiments I'm building on the side. Some are shipping, some are in progress, all are things I wanted to exist.

cards.title: Coming soon
cards.description: An app I'm currently working on — details and a link will land here soon.

blocks.title: Got an idea worth building?
blocks.description: If you're working on something and want a collaborator or a second set of eyes, get in touch.
